rules.title: Server Rules
rules.description: Please read and follow all rules. Violations may result in warnings, mutes, kicks, or bans.
rules.footer: Last updated by staff • Violations can be reported to moderators

rules.title: Be Respectful
rules.description: Treat all members with respect. Harassment, hate speech, slurs, and targeted abuse are strictly prohibited. Engage in constructive discussions without trolling or baiting — disagreements are welcome as long as they're handled maturely. Do not dogpile new or existing members.

rules.title: No Discrimination
rules.description: Discriminatory behavior including racism, homophobia, and transphobia will not be tolerated and may result in an immediate ban without warning. Given this is an Eminem server, some lenience is allowed for edgy humor, but it is up to staff discretion to decide when jokes go too far.

rules.title: No NSFW or Illegal Content
rules.description: Do not post or link to any NSFW, NSFL, explicit, sexually suggestive, or illegal content anywhere in the server. Sharing, requesting, or discussing illegal content — including piracy, drugs, weapons, or CSAM — is an immediate permanent ban. Keep all shared content safe and legal for all ages.

rules.title: No Spam or Self-Promotion
rules.description: Do not spam messages, reactions, images, or mentions. Unsolicited advertisements, external server invites, and off-topic flooding are not allowed. Off-topic chat isn't strictly enforced but if it's seriously off-topic, please use the designated channel.

rules.title: No Doxxing or Privacy Violations
rules.description: Do not share personal information of others without their explicit consent — including real names, addresses, locations, IP addresses, private messages, or photos. Uphold the privacy and security of all members.

rules.title: Creative Submissions
rules.description: Share your creative work in the designated channels: #projects and #projects-discussion. AI-generated content is banned from #projects and #artwork — this includes AI art, AI-generated beats or songs (Udio, Suno, etc.), and AI-written tracklists. You may use AI as a tool within a larger project, but pure AI slop will be removed.

rules.title: No Raiding or Inter-Server Drama
rules.description: Do not raid or discuss raiding other servers. Do not engage in or promote inflammatory conduct intended to manufacture drama with other communities. Anyone using this server as a launching pad for raids or coordinated attacks will be instantly banned.

rules.title: No Alternate Accounts
rules.description: Do not attempt to circumvent rules or evade bans using alternate accounts. Alts are strictly disallowed with minor exceptions — DM a staff member if you have an alt in the server and it may be sanctioned if it meets the right criteria.

rules.title: Use AI Responsibly
rules.description: Use AI ethically and avoid generating inappropriate, misleading, or harmful content with it. Do not use AI to impersonate other members. Respect intellectual property rights and ensure any AI-assisted content aligns with community standards.

rules.title: Follow Discord ToS
rules.description: You must be at least 13 years old and comply with Discord's Terms of Service (discord.com/terms) and Community Guidelines (discord.com/guidelines) at all times.

rules.title: Listen to Staff
rules.description: Follow the directions of moderators and admins. Arguing with or disrespecting staff decisions in public channels is not allowed. The mod team will intervene when necessary to maintain a positive atmosphere.

rules.title: No Rage Baiting
rules.description: Grievous rage baiting is a bannable offense. It's not funny, it's not entertaining, and it ruins the experience for everyone else. Don't do it.

rules.title: Keep It Appropriate
rules.description: Avoid being excessively annoying or sexual in chat, especially if you are a minor. This behavior is a recipe for disaster and will be dealt with by staff accordingly.

rules.title: Display Names
rules.description: Do not use invisible, blank, or extremely distracting characters in your display name. Keep it readable and non-disruptive.

rules.title: Stop Leaving and Rejoining
rules.description: Repeatedly leaving and rejoining the server serves no purpose and is disruptive. If you want a break, just mute the server. Members observed doing this repeatedly will be banned.
